promoted_facts.fact: Management fee formula: $20M fixed + $18K/franchised club + $40K/corporate club
promoted_facts.source: Item 21 Note 1 / reader report Section H
Item 21 Note 2 / reader report Section H

promoted_facts.fact: Former interim CEO of PF Inc. has financial interest in franchisee
promoted_facts.source: Item 21 Note 5 / reader report Section H

promoted_facts.fact: Sublease right: franchisor can require 10% of franchise sqft at FMV
Low-performance exit: lowest 5% for 12 months + unprofitable + 12 months notice
Cure Period Extension Fee: up to 4% additional royalty
2024 NAF spending: 24% production, 53% media, 7% admin, 16% other
Debranding requirement includes trade dress (flooring colors, wall colors, equipment piping)
Voting amendment thresholds: 70% franchised for FA changes, 66%/51% for fee caps and remodel
